prompt: 我做了一个 A4 SVG 知识图谱封面，但卡片互相压住，线穿过文字，卡片里的文字也没有上下居中。请把它改成适合打印的四列树形布局，并给我一个自动检查脚本的检查项清单。
assertions: Uses measured columns and safe margins rather than manual dragging.
Requires minimum card gaps and text padding.
Draws connectors beneath cards/text and uses label shields.
Checks rendered text-group centering with a browser geometry validator.
